title: これでカワイさバッチグー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Curren Chan's request, we reserve a time for a
yoga lesson.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Apparently, it starts with meditation...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Breathe in... and out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be really into it. I watch over her
silently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom! ♪ Boom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that sound?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woo! Time to raise the roof!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Maruzen?! This is—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come dance on the platform with me, Curren!
Everyone's gotta get jiggy! TGIF! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: "Jiggy"? "TGIF"? ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen's so cute!
She's so cool! Sooo pretty!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No way. Everyone's looking at Maruzen with stars
in their eyes. They're calling her cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Did the cutest Umamusume in the world change
while I wasn't looking?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oomph oomph oomph oomph! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um, Maruzen? Do you mind if I dance with you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the music really got me in the mood. ♪
So can I—what was it again? Can I "TGIF" with
you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I like those eyes—the greed and the fire. You
could get me excited with eyes like those.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you've got me going! I've got some cool
moves and words just for you... ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oomph oomph oomph! ♪ I'm totally nailing it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Totally tubular!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hooray! ♪ Let's keep this going till morning,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Where's Maruzen? Where's the platform?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...A dream? No, it was more like a completely
different world...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I must have found an unexplored territory of
cuteness! I'm sure that made me even cuter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's eyes sparkle. Her cuteness and
sharpness are even more refined than before!
